payload.issue: Missing role/scope authorization; only authentication is checked
payload.evidence_span: cancel_invoice checks is_authenticated, loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering, and the denial body returns invoice_id.
payload.recommended_fix: Add role or scope authorization checks beyond is_authenticated to ensure the caller has permission to cancel invoices.
